name: audit-pending-spec-fidelity exempts CLI flag tokens like --paths from the architecture-vocabulary check per the §25.2 exemption clause
command: mkdir -p pending/F-4-x arch && printf 'F-4 minimal\n' > arch/a.md && printf '%s' '{"name":"x","command":"bash scan.sh --paths src --out r.jsonl","expect":{"exit_code":0}}' > pending/F-4-x/c.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/detectors/audit-pending-spec-fidelity.sh" --pending pending/F-4-x --arch arch/a.md 2>out.txt && grep -q 'fidelity_audit=clean' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
